channel.title: Dance on Mícheál Keating / Archive
channel.description: Recent content in Dance on Mícheál Keating / Archive

item.title: Aoibhinn O'Dea - Foot of the Lungs
item.description: Sound Composition, live sound performance Solo movement performance by Aoibhinn O’Dea with soundtrack composed and performed with live electronics by Mícheál Keating. Inspired by the music of Eliane Radigue, the score uses additive synthesis, beating tones, and glacially shifting timbres to complement the physicality of O’Dea’s performance. Performed at What Next Festival, Dance Limerick, February 2026. Image credit: Maurice Gunning.

item.title: GROUNDWORK - Péist/O'Dea/Kemp
item.description: Sound Improvisation (vocals, guitar, fiddle, flute, signal processing) Building towards collapse only to build again, this performance brings together Limerick-based improvised noise group Péist, movement artist Aoibinn O’Dea and video artist Billy Kemp. GROUNDWORK unearths an interdependence between sound, movement and live-visuals, moving through fleeting moments of unity and discord. Taking their name from the Irish for ‘worm’, Péist’s improvisations use synthesisers, electro-acoustic instruments, and purpose-built software to wriggle and writhe between sounds and musical forms, burrowing through the dirt.
